dismissalText.long: c Archer b Yash Raj Punja
dismissalText.commentary: Sai Sudharsan c Archer b Yash Raj Punja 55 (36b 6x4 2x6 57m) SR: 152.77

dismissalComment.html: clothed to long on, and Punja breaks through! Googly floated up full outside off, and Sudharsan is enticed into the big hit. The bat, though, closes upon impact and the ball arrows off the lower part of the blade. Archer tracks it and the takes it. Sudharsan livid with himself, but RR have something to show for this middle overs squeeze!

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Deshpande b Brijesh Sharma 84 (44b 9x4 3x6 85m) SR: 190.9

dismissalComment.html: Gill looks for something funky, and Gill departs! Speared in full outside off. Gill is perhaps anticipating that delivery too and he shapes up for the scoop. Gets into a tangle where he cannot free his arms enough, though, and the ball clinks off the toe-end. Deshpande takes it neatly over his shoulder while back-pedaling from short fine, and Gill's excellent knock has come to an end!

dismissalText.commentary: Jos Buttler c Ferreira b Jadeja 13 (10b 1x4 1x6 9m) SR: 130

dismissalComment.html: another miscue and this time, taken! Jadeja does that pocket celebration, and this is a huge wicket! Tossed up a touch outside off and Buttler's eyes light up. He looks to go downtown but slices across it way too much. Ferreira comes in off the long off fence and does the rest. Buttler disappointed with himself, but this is another very handy breakthrough!

dismissalText.commentary: Jason Holder c Jaiswal b Brijesh Sharma 7 (7b 1x4 0x6 10m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: Shanked to extra cover, and the slower ball does the trick for Brijesh! Dug in outside off too, meaning Holder has to reach out for it and then try to fetch it. He tries his best but he is always working against the line. A tame slice in the end and Jaiswal, stood at extra cover, makes no mistake!

dismissalText.long: c Arshad Khan b Mohammed Siraj
dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Arshad Khan b Mohammed Siraj 36 (16b 3x4 3x6 18m) SR: 225

dismissalComment.html: sharp short ball, and Sooryavanshi perishes! This is a brutish delivery, bowled at 146.6kph and climbing through on middle and leg. Sooryavanshi is cramped on the pull and cannot free his arms the way he would like. Only gets height, via the top edge and Arshad, running to his right from short fine, gobbles up the chance. Big, big moment in the game!

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel b Rashid Khan 24 (10b 1x4 3x6 26m) SR: 240

dismissalComment.html: hot knife through butter, and Jurel is outta here! Fizzed through on a length just outside off. Jurel plays the flatter trajectory and shapes for the cut. Gives himself room but is awfully late on the stroke. The ball whizzes past his flailing blade and knocks back off stump. Rashid on the board early!

dismissalText.commentary: Donovan Ferreira b Rashid Khan 4 (2b 1x4 0x6 1m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: does him all ends up, and Rashid has the ball on a string! Another fizzing leg-break, on a fullish length on middle and off. Drifts in a little and then rips away. Ferreira has no clue about it and he plays for the googly. Plays down the wrong line, and Ferreira has to trudge off. Rashid is over the moon, and GT firmly in control now!

dismissalText.commentary: Ravindra Jadeja lbw b Rashid Khan 38 (25b 3x4 2x6 39m) SR: 152

dismissalComment.html: Rashid off on a celebrappeal, and the finger goes up! Jadeja, though, wants to review! Another fizzing delivery, pitching full on leg and then straightening a touch. Jadeja plays outside the line and gets beaten on the inside. Impact is on the front pad, and this could be a review more in hope. No bat involved. And Ball Tracking has the crashing into middle and leg. Jadeja has to go, and he takes a review along with him too!

dismissalText.commentary: Tushar Deshpande c Washington Sundar b Holder 1 (3b 0x4 0x6 10m) SR: 33.33

dismissalComment.html: another terrible shank, and Holder finishes off the demolition job! GT go level with SRH at the top of the table, and RR have been consigned to another mid-season defeat! Half-way down outside off and this climbs steeply too. Deshpande cannot control his swat and only clinks it towards backward point. A tame end to what was largely a tame RR performance, and GT have been full value for the two points tonight!
